description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a minimalist design, featuring clean lines and a flat roof. The structure is primarily composed of smooth white walls, large rectangular windows, and glass railings that provide a sense of openness and light. The interior includes a straight wooden staircase with glass balustrades, leading from the ground floor to the upper level. The upper floor has a balcony or landing area with glass panels overlooking the lower level. The house appears to have an open-plan layout with large window openings on both floors, maximizing natural light. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, with an emphasis on geometric forms and transparency.
description: A modern, two-story house with white walls, large windows, and glass railings, featuring a wooden staircase and a flat roof. The design is minimalist and open, emphasizing clean lines and transparency.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the side of the house with a large window, glass balcony railing, and the flat roof, highlighting the upper floor's open area.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the exterior wall with three large rectangular window openings, revealing the staircase and interior layout.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the narrow side of the house with a single large window, offering a glimpse of the staircase and glass railings inside.
description_view_3: View 3 provides a cutaway view of the interior, clearly showing the wooden staircase, glass balustrades, and the open-plan upper floor.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a large rectangular opening, flush with the wall, with no visible porch or decorative elements, emphasizing minimalism.
